ogTitle: Currumbin Waters vs Cushnie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Currumbin Waters and Cushnie.
heading: Currumbin Waters vs Cushnie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Currumbin Waters, Queensland and Cushnie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Currumbin Waters has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Cushnie (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Currumbin Waters or Cushnie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Currumbin Waters has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Cushnie scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Currumbin Waters scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Cushnie scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Currumbin Waters or Cushnie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Currumbin Waters has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
